meanings.definition: any of various organs that synthesize substances needed by the body and release it through ducts or directly into the bloodstream
not open or public; kept private or not revealed
conducted with or marked by hidden aims or methods

examples: their secret signal was a wink
a hidden room or place of concealment such as a priest hole
the secret compartment in the desk

meanings.definition: hidden from general view or use
examples: a privy place to rest and think

meanings.definition: (of information) given in confidence or in secret
examples: this arrangement must be kept confidential

meanings.definition: having an import not apparent to the senses nor obvious to the intelligence; beyond ordinary understanding
examples: the secret learning of the ancients

meanings.definition: the next to highest level of official classification for documents
